RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: The Gillam magnetometer is part of the CARISMA magnetometer array. It is located at: 56.376 Glat 265.360 GLong.

InformationURL.Name: Canadian Array for Realtime Investigations of Magnetic Activity Homepage
InformationURL.Description: Detailed information about the Eskimo Point magnetometer and the CARISMA Array.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
